narrative:
Lafayette TWP township has 5,135 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.4 percentage points.
